race.comment: SHOW COUNTY (7) tough ask first-up when he came out quickly from the wide draw before fading to run fifth over 1200m in the Provincial Mid Champs. Gets the gun run for this and all three wins have come over this trip. Value player. ANNIE'S ROSE (10) returns from a let-up after racing in stronger company. Comes out of a strong rating race after finishing fourth to Cinsault at Randwick over 1300m in BM78 class. Since fitted with a 1000m tick over trial, go close. AUDREY'S LANE (4) took control early first-up with an all-the-way win over 1200m at this track. Will handle the weight rise from the sticky draw. Has an excellent second-up record and can go on with it this prep. ART VOLANT (3) back in trip after struggling to see the 1600m last start. Maps well with the claim and can return to form from the low draw. AFRICAN DAISY (1) fitter after one run back and looks well placed with Stanley's 3kg claim from the low draw. Will hold a forward position and make sharp improvement.
